title: Mission-scale decidability of directed-energy lunar-regolith construction claims: reproducibility package

creators.name: Ren, Lijian
creators.affiliation: Inner Mongolia University of Technology; Hohai University

description: Public reproducibility package for the Acta Astronautica candidate manuscript Mission-scale decidability of directed-energy lunar-regolith construction claims: a physics-grounded measurement contract. The archive contains derived coordinate-contract tables, open-access census and screening logs, broader source-group metadata, consequentiality audit outputs, worked-example outputs, transient heat-balance, wall-input closure-boundary and efficiency-sensitivity scripts, final figure exports, and reproducibility checks. It excludes active submission manuscripts, submission PDFs and LaTeX packages, cover letters, reviewer-response drafts, internal rounds/logs, raw third-party data, credentials, and private author/funding files.
